logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'motion_count_out' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1016] The critical path in module 'video_gray_live' consists of the following: 'icmp' operation 1 bit ('icmp_ln92', video_gray_live.cpp:92) [121] (1.639 ns) 'select' operation 4 bit ('region_idx', video_gray_live.cpp:92) [122] (1.024 ns) multiplexor before 'phi' operation 4 bit ('region_idx') with incoming values : ('region_idx', video_gray_live.cpp:92) ('select_ln70_1_cast', video_gray_live.cpp:84) ('select_ln70_cast', video_gray_live.cpp:76) [137] (2.065 ns) 'phi' operation 4 bit ('region_idx') with incoming values : ('region_idx', video_gray_live.cpp:92) ('select_ln70_1_cast', video_gray_live.cpp:84) ('select_ln70_cast', video_gray_live.cpp:76) [137] (0.000 ns) 'shl' operation 9 bit ('shl_ln100', video_gray_live.cpp:100) [141] (2.397 ns) 'or' operation 9 bit ('or_ln100', video_gray_live.cpp:100) [142] (0.990 ns) multiplexor before 'phi' operation 16 bit ('motion_count_accum_loc_2', video_gray_live.cpp:99) with incoming values : ('motion_count_accum_loc_0_load') ('add_ln99', video_gray_live.cpp:99) [146] (1.588 ns) 'phi' operation 16 bit ('motion_count_accum_loc_2', video_gray_live.cpp:99) with incoming values : ('motion_count_accum_loc_0_load') ('add_ln99', video_gray_live.cpp:99) [146] (0.000 ns) multiplexor before 'phi' operation 16 bit ('motion_count_accum_loc_3', video_gray_live.cpp:99) with incoming values : ('motion_count_accum_loc_0_load') ('add_ln99', video_gray_live.cpp:99) [155] (1.588 ns) 'phi' operation 16 bit ('motion_count_accum_loc_3', video_gray_live.cpp:99) with incoming values : ('motion_count_accum_loc_0_load') ('add_ln99', video_gray_live.cpp:99) [155] (0.000 ns) 'store' operation 0 bit ('motion_count_latched_write_ln127', video_gray_live.cpp:127) of variable 'motion_count_accum_loc_3', video_gray_live.cpp:99 on static variable 'motion_count_latched' [178] (1.588 ns)
Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1016 see docs.xilinx.com/access/sources/dita/topic?Doc_Version=2023.2%20English&url=ug1448-hls-guidance&resourceid=200-1016.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-871] Estimated clock period (12.880 ns) exceeds the target (target clock period: 10.000 ns, clock uncertainty: 2.700 ns, effective delay budget: 7.300 ns). Resolution: For help on HLS 200-871 see docs.xilinx.com/access/sources/dita/topic?Doc_Version=2023.2%20English&url=ug1448-hls-guidance&resourceid=200-871.html
WARNING: [XFORM 203-561] 'VITIS_LOOP_46_1' (video_gray_live.cpp:46:22) in function 'video_gray_live' is an infinite loop.
